title: Processes in whitebox causes synth_ecp5 JSON backend to fail
body:
Run:

```
yosys -p "add -mod top; synth_ecp5 -json /dev/null"
```

as the ECP5 distributed RAM whiteboxes contain processes but nothing elaborates those processes; the JSON backend is now failing:

```
ERROR: Module DPR16X4C contains processes, which are not supported by JSON backend.
```

A workaround would be to unwhitebox those cells as I don't think there is much useful optimisation that can be done anyway, but I suspect this issue may well affect other situations involving boxes in processes as well.

cc @edbordin
code_blocks: ERROR: Module DPR16X4C contains processes, which are not supported by JSON backend.
